title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Embassy Group

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at Embassy Group
jsonLd.description:
Embassy Group has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Dhanbad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Embassy Group:
Embassy Group is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Embassy Group!
